name: AlertTimerMessage

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment:
The type representing messages that are passed inside the Rating.
    Notice: AddNewMessage receive two params: Float will be time to display and Html Msg will be a html struture.
        Tip: Use Css to improve Html Msg.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: The model is simple. It's have a dict with msg and counter of displayed msg.
aliases.type: { messages : Dict Int Message, count : Int }
